## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced in this PR. Include motivation, context, and any relevant issue numbers.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Refactoring / Code style / Optimization
- [ ] 🔧 Infrastructure / CI / Configuration

## Workspace Packages Affected

- [ ] `@memora/shared`
- [ ] `@memora/server`
- [ ] `@memora/worker`
- [ ] `@memora/client`
- [ ] `@memora/extension`

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Automated Unit/Integration Tests (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Local Manual Verification (Browser/API testing)

```bash
# Verification commands executed:
pnpm build
pnpm test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated corresponding documentation if applicable
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added unit/integration tests that prove my fix is effective or feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally
